content:
# Geochronology

**Summary**: The science of determining the age of rocks, fossils, and other geological materials.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-al-hakimi|Al-Hakimi, 2024]] applied geochronology to date granitic minerals.

## Scientific Context

- [[2024-al-hakimi|Al-Hakimi, 2024]] Establishing the timing of magmatic events in the Arabian Shield.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2024-al-hakimi|Al-Hakimi, 2024]] U-Pb dating on zircon crystals.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Zircon U–Pb SHRIMP dating reveals that granite has Ediacaran- Cryogenian ages (~597- 645 Ma). ([[2024-al-hakimi|Al-Hakimi, 2024, p. 102]])
